creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Krzysztof,

These outside of the scope of this PR but it's recommended that these be fixed these too.

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/lib/collectd/cpu.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libstatgrab.so.10 from devel/libstatgrab but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libstatgrab.so:devel/libstatgrab
Error: /usr/local/lib/collectd/dns.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libpcap.so.1 from net/libpcap but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libpcap.so:net/libpcap
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
